voiceover: YieldFlow Guard is a Uniswap v4 Hook on X Layer for pricing exit pressure in yield-position pools.
Early yield pools need instant exits, but liquidity providers take concentrated risk when everyone exits the yield token at once.
The Hook quotes a dynamic fee before each swap and updates net exit pressure after the swap. Balanced flow pays base fee, worsening exit pressure pays more, and rebalancing flow pays less.
The Hook and demo pool are deployed on X Layer mainnet, chain ID 196, with verifiable addresses and transactions.
The demo uses a static yield-position pair, st-yUSDG over USDG, connected through a minimal router and the Uniswap v4 PoolManager.
Three real swaps trigger three fee paths: base fee 500, high exit-pressure fee 3000, and rebalancing fee 100.
The final hook state records net exit pressure at 110e18 and last fee at 100 because the final trade reduced exit pressure.
The market path is safer liquidity bootstrapping for X Layer yield wrappers, static yield assets, and stable yield pools.
